prompt:
Ultra-realistic dynamic wide-angle selfie shot of a young man wearing yellow-tinted rectangular sunglasses, a dark denim jacket over a black t-shirt.

Action & Composition:
Shot from an extended arm perspective (selfie POV), slightly above eye level, with strong wide-angle lens distortion (action camera / 16–20mm look). The subject is riding fast while pushing a shopping cart filled with groceries, creating a sense of motion and chaos. His mouth is open in an excited, adrenaline-filled expression, looking directly into the camera.

Scene Details:
Outdoor parking lot environment in daylight, with parked cars, industrial buildings, and a wide open asphalt space. A dog is running alongside the subject, slightly behind, mid-stride, adding energy and spontaneity to the scene.

Motion & Effects:
Heavy motion blur and radial blur in the background to emphasize speed. Foreground remains sharp while surroundings streak outward. Subtle camera shake for realism.

Lighting:
Natural daylight, slightly warm tones, soft shadows, realistic highlights on skin and metallic surfaces.

Style & Aesthetic:
Cinematic action snapshot, candid lifestyle photography, high-energy street moment, vlog-style realism mixed with commercial polish. Slight HDR, high contrast, ultra-detailed textures, sharp focus on subject.

Mood:
Chaotic, fun, spontaneous, rebellious, high-adrenaline moment.

Technical Keywords:
wide-angle lens, action cam perspective, motion blur, radial zoom blur, dynamic framing, handheld shot, 8K, ultra-realistic, photorealistic, high detail.
